response:
Alex reads many books.
Books hold new stories.
Stories show love deeply.
Love changes minds slowly.
Minds grow wide open.
Open hearts feel joy.
Joy fills each day.
Days pass very fast.
Fast reading helps much.
Much work takes time.
Time spent on pages.
Pages count up high.
High numbers mean progress.
Progress shows clear gains.
Gains come from effort.
Effort builds strong skills.
Skills make reading easy.
Easy tasks feel good.
Good habits form soon.
Soon results will show.
Show how far gone.
Gone are old fears.
Fears fade with light.
Light shines on truth.
Truth reveals new paths.
Paths lead to change.
Change brings fresh views.
Views expand horizons wide.
Wide worlds await now.
Now Alex reads more.
More pages mean growth.
Growth needs daily care.
Care ensures steady pace.
Pace keeps one focused.
Focused minds solve puzzles.
Puzzles challenge the brain.
Brain works hard daily.
Daily sums reach forty.
Forty pages per day.
Day brings new hope.
Hope fuels future dreams.
Dreams inspire bold actions.
Actions create lasting change.
Change defines the journey.
Journey ends with wisdom.
Wisdom guides next steps.
Steps lead to peace.
Peace comes from within.
Within lies true self.
Self accepts all views.
Views merge into one.
One path unites all.
All readers find joy.
Joy ends this tale.
Tale tells of growth.
Growth starts with three.
Three books changed lives.
Lives improve with reading.
Reading opens closed doors.
Doors lead to friends.
Friends share new ideas.
Ideas spark fresh thoughts.
Thoughts build better days.
Days bring warm sun.
Sun lights up pages.
Pages hold sweet words.
Words paint vivid scenes.
Scenes move the heart.
Heart beats with rhythm.
Rhythm matches the flow.
Flow guides the mind.
Mind seeks new truths.
Truths appear in stories.
Stories end with peace.
Peace stays forever more.
